calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Melanie Gheno #7489.

Kristina M. Zinnen, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs the Board of Trustees, et al.
No appearance by defendants Leo Sanchez, individually, Leo Sanchez, individually and doing business as Sanchez Grading or Sanchez Grading.
John Hagan, Accounts Receivable Manager, was placed under oath and examined.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 22, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 7, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs the Board of Trustees, in their capacities as Trustees of the Cement Masons Health and Welfare Trust Fund for Northern California, Cement Masons Pension Trust Fund for Northern California, Cement Masons Vacation/Holiday Trust Fund for Northern California and Cement Masons Apprenticeship and Traning Trust Fund for Northern California as follows:

Principal - $9,460.87.
Damages - $4,950.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,262.19.
Attorney Fees - $8,618.75.
Costs - $418.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $29,710.31.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
